title: Grilled Tzimmes with Tahini Paste
description: This grilled tzimmes features a gooey and fermented base made from tahini paste, ideal for pescatarian diets seeking an Ethiopian favorite.

ingredients.name: 1 can (14 oz) pineapple chunks in juice
ingredients.notes: Choose sweet and tangy for best flavor.

ingredients.name: 3 cloves garlic finely minced
ingredients.notes: A little goes a long way.

instructions: Preheat your grill to medium-high heat.
Mix tahini paste with pineapple juice and add garlic. Stir until smooth.
Place the tzimmes mixture into a shallow dish and refrigerate for at least an hour, or overnight if time allows.
Remove from refrigerator and stir in minced garlic again. Cover and let sit for another 10 minutes to thicken slightly.
Brush grill grates with oil to prevent sticking. Add tzimmes to the grill over medium-high heat.
Cook until golden brown and bubbly, about 5-7 minutes per side. Remove from grill and serve warm.
